name: iPhone 15 Pro
description: A premium titanium iPhone built for speed, pro-level photography, and all-day performance. Ideal for creators and power users who want the smoothest iOS experience.

name: iPhone 15
description: A perfectly balanced iPhone with a sharp display, excellent cameras, and dependable battery life. Great for everyday premium use.

name: Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Samsung's ultimate flagship with a bright, immersive display, pro zoom camera system, and powerhouse performance for gaming and productivity.

name: Galaxy Z Fold5
description: A premium foldable that turns into a mini tablet. Perfect for multitasking, streaming, and working on the go with a futuristic form factor.

name: OnePlus 12
description: Fast, fluid, and refined. A flagship that focuses on speed, smooth UI, rapid charging, and a camera system tuned for vibrant shots.

name: Pixel 8 Pro
description: A clean Android flagship with top-tier computational photography, smart features, and smooth performance designed around everyday convenience.

name: Xiaomi 14 Ultra
description: A camera-first powerhouse with premium build, an ultra-bright display, and flagship hardware that delivers speed with style.

name: Nothing Phone (2)
description: A distinctive design with smooth performance, a clean UI, and a premium feel. Built for users who like tech that looks different.

name: iQOO 12
description: A performance-focused flagship tuned for gaming: ultra-fast chipset, high refresh display, and strong thermals for consistent FPS.

name: realme GT 5 Pro
description: Flagship speed with a bright display and fast charging. An excellent pick for users who want premium specs at a sharper price.
